title: RentifyNow
description: SaaS platform for solo landlords to manage properties, tenants, finances, documents, and messages, with a built-in AI assistant.
metrics: Built and operated end to end, from product design to VPS infrastructure
highlights: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture for independent landlords
Property, tenant, finance, document, and messaging workflows
Owned deployment, monitoring, and production operations

title: HouseifyNow
description: Smart home management SaaS with property tracking, maintenance scheduling, and financial oversight for homeowners.
metrics: Homeowner-focused platform with integrated financial and maintenance tools
highlights: Homeowner dashboard with property portfolio overview
Cross-platform support via Tauri (Web, Desktop, Mobile)

title: GoalifyNow
description: Goal tracking and habit management SaaS helping users set, track, and achieve personal and professional goals.
metrics: Productivity platform with habit tracking and goal analytics
highlights: Goal creation with milestones and progress tracking

title: DoifyNow
description: The mother organization and shared infrastructure hub powering the entire SaaS product ecosystem including RentifyNow, HouseifyNow, and GoalifyNow.
metrics: Infrastructure hub managing shared databases, monitoring, and deployment
highlights: Centralized infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, monitoring
Shared .NET libraries consumed by all product microservices

title: DeployifyNow
description: Self-hosted deployment platform with VPS provisioning, CI/CD orchestration, real-time build logs via SignalR, and full infrastructure management through Dokploy.
metrics: Infrastructure automation platform managing VPS deployments and CI/CD pipelines
highlights: Real-time build logs and deployment status via SignalR
GitHub App integration for repo management and webhooks
VPS agent architecture with remote command execution

title: League Plus
description: Flutter mobile application for browsing League of Legends player profiles, matches, and game statistics.
metrics: Mobile-first interface backed by League of Legends data

title: Distributed Database
description: Java distributed key-value database in which nodes communicate over TCP and forward requests across the network.
metrics: Concurrent client and node communication over TCP
highlights: TCP client and server communication between nodes
Dynamic node discovery and request forwarding

title: Image Steganography
description: C++ coursework project exploring image steganography and hidden-data encoding techniques.
metrics: Hands-on exploration of image data encoding

title: Portfolio Website
description: Responsive, bilingual portfolio built with React 19, TypeScript, Vite, and accessible component patterns.
metrics: Code-split sections, structured SEO data, and automated quality checks
highlights: SEO optimized with structured data markup

title: Discord Bot
description: Discord music bot built from scratch with C# and Discord.Net.

title: ToDoList
description: Task-list web application with a React frontend and a C# API using Entity Framework.
highlights: Task lists and individual task views
